data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding observability of agent actions. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or API responses that confirm the existence of such observability features. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of observability into which agent performed action.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
